title: lysimachia jingdongensis
intro: Lysimachia jingdongensis, also known as the Jingdong flower or golden thread, is a type of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of southwestern China, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lysimachia jingdongensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Lysimachia jingdongensis can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
